description: Small control prompt for cold/warm latency and basic instruction-following checks.

messages.content: You are concise and literal. Follow the requested output format exactly.
Return exactly three bullet lines in this order and with no extra text: verification phrase: north star velvet, locker: 11, service window: 14:20 UTC

expected.notes: Useful as a tiny cold/warm control. Exact wording can vary later, but extra chatter should count against cleanliness.
